title: Guided Goal Handoff + Safe Artifact Preview Contract
titleZh: 目标执行手册与安全产物预览层
scope: Freeze a reusable guided handoff contract for v16 goal execution.
Represent phase, role, task, command, review, verifier, release, stop, and deferred-contract state as data.
Keep all next commands copy-only and user-mediated.
nonGoals: No Workbench adopt, apply, retry, rollback, audit, model invocation, install, mutation, or arbitrary local file read.
No replacement of Stage Charter HTML or JSON.
safetyBoundaries: Workbench remains read-only, display-only, and copy-only.
Review approval is required before commit, push, or merge.
Worker self-check is evidence for the worker only and is not final acceptance.
Routes introduced in later tasks must be GET-only and registered-ref-only.
Artifact safety fields must come from backend contract data, not frontend inference.

roles.description: Defines scope, task split, safety boundaries, stop conditions, and release gates.
Completes only the current approved task and records self-check evidence.
Uses isolated context to review diff, tests, docs, and evidence before commit.
Runs post-merge validation from main after a task is merged.
prohibited: claiming release readiness from worker self-check

roles.description: Collects final task index, review results, verification results, unsupported capabilities, and backlog.
prohibited: tag creation without explicit release step

tasks.name: plan approval and baseline freeze
scope: Freeze v16 plan, task list, safety boundaries, and review model.
risks: Unclear task boundary can expand later work.
acceptance: No code or dependency files changed.
tasks.reviewGate: Independent reviewer must approve before commit and merge.

tasks.name: handoff contract fixtures
scope: Add fixture-backed guided handoff contract samples and tests.
risks: UI or CLI integration before the contract shape is frozen.
acceptance: Fixtures cover goal, baseline, scope, nonGoals, safetyBoundaries, tasks, roles, commands, reviewModel, releaseGates, and stopConditions.
No Workbench or API route is added.
tasks.reviewGate: Independent reviewer must confirm there is no execution entry point.

tasks.name: CLI handoff generation
scope: Generate stable guided handoff JSON and Markdown with copy-only commands.
risks: CLI output may be mistaken for automatic execution.
acceptance: CLI writes only controlled handoff artifacts.
CLI does not execute commands or call models.
tasks.reviewGate: Independent reviewer must confirm commands remain copy-only.

tasks.name: read-only API exposure
scope: Expose registered handoff refs through GET-only routes.
risks: A route can become an execution or arbitrary path entry point.
acceptance: GET route returns registered handoff refs only.
prohibited: POST, PUT, PATCH, or DELETE routes
tasks.reviewGate: Independent reviewer must confirm read-only route boundaries.

tasks.name: Workbench handoff panel
scope: Render phases, roles, task status, and copy-only commands in Workbench.
risks: UI controls may imply browser execution.
acceptance: Commands are text for copying only.
Missing fields are displayed as missing contract data.
tasks.reviewGate: Independent reviewer must confirm display-only behavior.

tasks.name: safe artifact preview contract fixtures
tasks.titleZh: 安全产物预览 contract fixture
risks: Incomplete safety fields can allow unsafe render decisions.
acceptance: Fixtures cover safe text, unsafe binary, oversize, missing safety fields, and unknown MIME.
No frontend preview implementation is included.
tasks.reviewGate: Independent reviewer must confirm safety fields are explicit contract data.

tasks.name: safe artifact preview implementation
tasks.titleZh: 安全产物预览后端实现
scope: Generate bounded previews for registered artifacts only.
risks: Path traversal, oversized reads, or unsafe inline content.
acceptance: HTML and script content is not rendered inline.
tasks.reviewGate: Independent reviewer must confirm registered-ref-only behavior.

tasks.name: Workbench preview consumption
scope: Display safe text preview, unavailable states, and truncation from backend fields.
risks: Frontend may infer safety or render raw HTML.
acceptance: Frontend uses backend safety fields only.
No download or arbitrary open controls are added.
prohibited: Adopt, apply, retry, or rollback controls
tasks.reviewGate: Independent reviewer must confirm contract-only rendering.

tasks.name: route smoke and security coverage
scope: Add console server smoke and security tests for handoff and preview routes.
risks: Routes may allow path traversal or write state.
tasks.reviewGate: Independent reviewer must confirm route safety probes.

tasks.name: docs and operator guide
scope: Update README, operator guide, and v16 docs to match implemented behavior.
risks: Documentation may imply unsupported execution capabilities.
acceptance: Docs describe read-only and copy-only boundaries.
Docs do not mention unimplemented commands as available.
prohibited: Release status changes without release task
tasks.reviewGate: Independent reviewer must confirm docs match implementation.

tasks.name: release verification
scope: Run release-level verification from main and record evidence.
risks: Release gate may rely only on worker self-check.
acceptance: Failures are not reported as passes.
tasks.reviewGate: Independent reviewer must confirm release evidence is main-branch evidence.

tasks.name: closure
scope: Summarize v16 final closure, task index, supported capabilities, unsupported capabilities, and backlog.
risks: Deferred contract gaps may be mistaken for completed work.
verification: dependency diff is empty unless approved
tasks.reviewGate: Independent reviewer must confirm closure does not claim unsupported work.

blocks.title: Independent review
commands: /goal Start the v16 task independent reviewer with isolated context and read-only review instructions.

blocks.title: Commit, push, and merge after APPROVED

requirements: Reviewer reads the current branch diff and repository files directly.
Reviewer does not rely on worker summary alone.
Reviewer confirms task scope, dependency diff, safety boundaries, and evidence path.
Reviewer returns APPROVED or NEEDS_REVISION before commit.

releaseGates.requirement: Task 1 through Task 12 each have Chinese evidence.
Each task has an independent APPROVED or NEEDS_REVISION record.
package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml remain unchanged unless a dependency plan is approved.
Handoff and preview routes reject non-GET, mutation, arbitrary path, and traversal probes.
releaseGates.evidence: focused route smoke and security tests

releaseGates.requirement: v12 adoption, v14 Stage, and v15 Workbench read-only boundaries are not expanded.

stopConditions.condition: A task changes source, tests, frontend, server, kernel, or dependencies outside its approved scope.
package.json or pnpm-lock.yaml changes without an approved dependency plan.
Workbench adds write, execution, model, audit, mutation, install, adopt, apply, retry, or rollback controls.
A backend route accepts arbitrary paths or exposes local files outside registered refs.
Frontend code infers artifact safety fields instead of using backend contract data.
Validation fails and the worker cannot determine whether it is environment-only or a real blocker.
Task evidence is missing, mostly English, or deletes historical evidence.

deferredContracts.reason: Dedicated read-only diagnostics contract is not part of v16 Task 2.
Shared top-level capabilities object requires a separate approved task.
Shared route error envelope requires a separate approved task.
